creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text:
I think that it's power:

Power cycles:                   519
Power on hours:                 166
Unsafe shutdowns:               518

519 power cycles in 5 days? 518 unsafe shutdowns means that they were sudden. That's a power cycle (or brown out) every 20 minutes if this has been on continuously that time.

Temperature looks good (no temp warnings) and the smart data from the doesn't show accumulated over temperature time.
